TheGrievedPrinceofBeihai[北海悼王] was[Cao] Rui[曹蕤]. In the seventh year of theera [226], after theBrightEmperorascended the throne, he was installed asCounty PrinceofYangping[陽平縣王]. In the sixth year of theera [232], he changed fief toBeihai. In the first year of theera [233], he died. In the second year,[Cao] Zan, the son of thePrinceofLangye[琅邪王], received the succession of[Cao] Rui[曹蕤] and was enfeoffed asTownship Dukeof Chang [昌鄉公]. In the second year of theera [238], he was installed as Prince ofRao’an[饒安王]. In the seventh year of theera [246], he moved fief toWen’an[文安]. During theanderas, the fief gradually increased, joining with the previous for a total of three thousand and five hundred households.
